channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Iraq’s Prime Minister-Designate Thrust Into U.S.-Iran Power Struggle
item.description: Ali al-Zaidi is tasked with forming a new Iraqi government amid US pressure to curb Iranian influence. Ali al-Zaidi, a political unknown, has been tasked with forming a new coalition government.

item.title: Australia moves to tax Meta, Google and TikTok to fund newsrooms
item.description: Australia plans to tax Meta, Google, and TikTok to fund newsrooms through draft legislation by July. Australia is proposing to tax Meta, Google and TikTok a proportion of their revenue to pay for news reporters.

item.title: US, allies release joint statement supporting Panama's sovereignty
item.description: The US and allies released a joint statement supporting Panama's sovereignty. US, allies release joint statement supporting Panama's sovereignty.

item.title: White House hails ‘two kings’ as King Charles delivers pointed remarks
item.description: King Charles III hailed US-UK ties at a White House state dinner. King Charles III has hailed US-UK ties at a state dinner in the White House. White House hails ‘two kings’ as King Charles delivers pointed remarks.

item.title: Afghan students recount harrowing university strike
item.description: Afghan students described a missile hitting their university, with officials blaming Pakistan for the attack. Afghan students have described the moment a missile hit their university. Officials blame Pakistan for Monday’s attack.

item.title: US Senate blocks bid to stop Trump using military against Cuba
item.description: The US Senate blocked a bid to stop President Trump using military force against Cuba. Senator Tim Kaine criticized the move, saying if another country did to the US what it was doing to Cuba, it would be considered an act of war.

item.title: UN aid chief says situation in Somalia worsened by US war on Iran
item.description: UN relief coordinator Tom Fletcher said the situation in Somalia has worsened due to the US war on Iran. He made these comments during a visit to the country. UN relief coordinator Tom Fletcher has slammed the war on Iran during a visit to Somalia.

item.title: ​Battle of wills: On the U.S. war on Iran
item.description: The US war on Iran has led to a standoff over the Strait of Hormuz. The US should lift its blockade to allow Iran to open the strategic waterway. The U. S.

item.title: Karachi Residents Store Cooking Gas In Balloons Amid Fuel Shortage: Report
item.description: Residents in Karachi are storing cooking gas in balloons due to a severe fuel shortage. Locals described this method as a "last resort" amid the crisis. Locals described the method as a "last resort," citing the severity of the gas crisis.

item.title: ‘You'd be speaking French’: King Charles roasts Trump at state dinner
item.description: King Charles joked about Donald Trump's comments on European allies at a state dinner. He said to Trump, "You'd be speaking French" if not for NATO. As the heads of state traded jokes during their dinner toasts, King Charles referenced previous comments by Mr.

item.title: US, Latin America countries criticise China’s retaliation over Panama Canal
item.description: US and Latin American countries have criticized China's detention of nearly 70 Panamanian-flagged ships in retaliation for a Supreme Court ruling on the Panama Canal. The move has sparked diplomatic tensions between China and the US.

item.title: Iran Embassy Urges Expats To 'Sacrifice Their Lives', UK Reacts Strongly
item.description: The Iranian embassy has urged expats to "sacrifice their lives" in a message defended by the embassy as a call to patriotism. The UK has reacted strongly to the statement, expressing concern for the safety of British citizens in Iran.

item.title: UAE leaves OPEC and OPEC+ in huge blow to global oil producers' group
item.description: The UAE has left OPEC and OPEC+, citing criticism from fellow Arab states for not protecting it from Iranian attacks. The move is a significant blow to the global oil producers' group.

item.title: ‘It will never cover what’s authentic’: African music industry weighs up AI risks and rewards
item.description: The African music industry is weighing the risks and rewards of AI technology, with some artists embracing its potential while others stress its limitations. Nigerian singer-songwriter Fave has integrated AI into her music to counter unauthorized versions.

item.title: NASA's Artemis II moonship returns home to its launch site after historic voyage
item.description: NASA's Artemis II moonship returned to its launch site after a historic voyage. The mission marked a significant milestone in the US space program. NASA's Artemis II moonship returns home to its launch site after historic voyage.

item.title: Protecting U.S. Critical Infrastructure as Global Tensions Rise
item.description: As global tensions rise, the US is prioritizing the protection of its critical infrastructure, including power grids and transportation systems. Protecting U. S. Critical Infrastructure as Global Tensions Rise Security Magazine.

item.title: U.S. imposes sanctions on 35 individuals, entities for aiding Iran's sanctions evasions
item.description: The US imposed sanctions on 35 individuals and entities for aiding Iran's sanctions evasions to disrupt Tehran's payment mechanisms. The designations were intended to expose and disrupt the mechanisms used by Tehran to receive payment for oil and other commodities and reduce its revenue, Treasury said.

item.title: Iran conflict threatens global energy security and economic growth
item.description: The Iran conflict poses a threat to global energy security and economic growth. Rising tensions in the region could disrupt oil supplies, impacting the global economy. Iran conflict threatens global energy security and economic growth news. cgtn. com.

item.title: Trump says King Charles does not want Iran to have nuclear weapon
item.description: US President Trump stated that King Charles does not want Iran to possess a nuclear weapon. This comment was made during a tense period in US-UK relations. The event was held on the second ‌day of a four-day visit to the United States at a tense time in ties, ‌after Mr.

item.title: King Charles Urges Strong NATO Role Amid Ukraine War
item.description: King Charles emphasized the need for a strong NATO role amid the ongoing Ukraine war. He described freedom as being under attack in a recent address. ‘Freedom Under Attack’: King Charles Urges Strong NATO Role Amid Ukraine War Open Magazine.
